problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
